title: astragalus hirsutus
intro: Astragalus hirsutus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Mongolia and China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus hirsutus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus hirsutus is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs to support overall well-being.
